queries.description: IAM policy should not grant full permissions to resources from the get-go, instead of granting permissions gradually as necessary.

files.expected_value: 'statement.resources' and 'statement.actions' should not contain '*'
files.actual_value: 'statement.resources' and 'statement.actions' contain '*'

queries.description: Query to find passwords and secrets in infrastructure code.

files.expected_value: Hardcoded secret key should not appear in source
files.actual_value: Hardcoded secret key appears in source

queries.query_name: Auto Scaling Group With No Associated ELB
queries.description: AWS Auto Scaling Groups must have associated ELBs to ensure high availability and improve application performance. This means the attribute 'load_balancers' must be defined and not empty.

files.expected_value: 'load_balancers' should be set and not empty
files.actual_value: 'load_balancers' is undefined

files.expected_value: 'load_balancers' should be set and not empty
files.actual_value: 'load_balancers' is undefined

queries.query_name: ECS Task Definition Network Mode Not Recommended
queries.description: Network_Mode should be 'awsvpc' in ecs_task_definition. AWS VPCs provides the controls to facilitate a formal process for approving and testing all network connections and changes to the firewall and router configurations

files.expected_value: 'network_mode' should equal to 'awsvpc'
files.actual_value: 'network_mode' is equal to '${var.network_mode}'

queries.description: Instance metadata can be accessed with both IMDSv1 or IMDSv2. Although, IMDSv2 service is a session-oriented service, granting additional protection against exposure of metadata information. That version should be used instead of IMDSv1 in order to mitigate those situations.

files.expected_value: 'module[autoscaling].metadata_options' should be defined with 'http_tokens' field set to 'required'
files.actual_value: 'module[autoscaling].metadata_options' is not defined

files.expected_value: 'module[autoscaling].metadata_options' should be defined with 'http_tokens' field set to 'required'
files.actual_value: 'module[autoscaling].metadata_options' is not defined
